texts.full_text: for an Unreal Engine 4 game. But what will this game be like? It’s possible that they could take over the Black Ops series and make a third installment, but it's also likely that they could start a new sub-series, taking the franchise in a different direction. Given the success of the Modern Warfare games, it would make sense for them to continue with a modern setting, perhaps exploring different geographical locations and conflicts. They could also experiment with new gameplay mechanics, such as incorporating more open-world elements or adding a greater emphasis on stealth. Alternatively, they mi

texts.full_text: the side of ribbed sandstone formations, mounded high like giant termite nests. In the distance, the city lights of modern Jericho twinkled on the northern horizon. The road ahead was winding and narrow, cutting through a landscape that seemed untouched by time except for occasional signs warning tourists to watch out for rocks or stray animals. Inside one of these cars sat Sarah Thompson, an American evangelical with fiery red hair tied back in a ponytail. She had been on this journey before—several times over the past few years—but each visit felt
